# Portal.view.HeaderToolbar: separate bar limited to home

Inside the Portal App home page, the separate bar slides out to the right when scrolling downwards.

This is not the case for all other pages, e.g. the learning section.

![Screenshot 2024-07-21 at 17 29 35](https://github.com/user-attachments/assets/1710451e-5bc7-464d-8a05-195c77054ba0)
